narrative:
New Franklin 3-B (precinct in Summit County) has 855 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
